typecheck.details: Rust crate compiles successfully in release mode

allIssues.description: rust_dot_product uses assert_eq! which panics on mismatched lengths instead of returning R error
Tests don't cover error case when rust_dot_product receives different-length vectors
rayon::prelude::* import at function scope rather than module scope
row_group lookup vector uses O(n) space; binary search over group boundaries could be more memory-efficient for large datasets
var_vals vector allocated fresh for each (row, v) combination; thread-local buffer could reduce allocation pressure
dim[2]==1L check duplicated in Rust dispatch path and R fallback path in crossbasis.R
cumulative_quad_form_se stores overall SE in extra column (n_lag+1) as duplicate of last cumulative column
O(p^2) quadratic form could be optimized for very large p, but current p<120 is fine
Test data loaded at file scope rather than in setup() block
cumfit in crosspred Rust path computed via R loop rather than also in Rust; minor optimization opportunity
rust_cum_result tryCatch pattern slightly different from matse_vec pattern; could be consolidated for consistency

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/rust-gotchas.md documenting: (1) Unicode in Rust doc comments breaks R loading, (2) rle+cumsum group boundary computation pattern, (3) with_disabled_rust() testing pattern for fallback tests

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update rust-worker skill's Step 2 (Write Tests First / TDD) to acknowledge that for Rust functions exposed via extendr, tests can only be written after the Rust function compiles, since R tests calling non-existent .Call() functions fail with 'function not found' rather than meaningful assertion failures. Suggest: 'For Rust functions, write a minimal compiling stub first, then write tests, then implement.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features extendr-setup, p1-crossbasis-kernel, and p2-quadratic-form-se all reported this deviation in skillFeedback. All three workers independently noted TDD red-phase is impractical for extendr functions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add clarification to rust-worker skill that rextendr::register_extendr() is only needed after Rust code changes (new/renamed/removed functions), not after R-only changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature r-integration worker noted in skillFeedback that register_extendr() was unnecessary for R-only changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Rust Code conventions: 'Do not use Unicode characters in Rust doc comments — use ASCII equivalents (x instead of ×, ^2 instead of ²). R cannot parse Unicode in auto-generated wrapper files.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature p2-quadratic-form-se encountered this bug during development; worker transcript shows debugging and fix.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml test command updated to include pkgload::load_all()
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — this change was already applied to services.yaml during extendr-setup

rejectedObservations.observation: rextendr::use_extendr() and rextendr::document() unavailable due to gert/usethis
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — already in AGENTS.md under 'Known Environment Issues'
